_comment: EdgeOne Pages deployment configuration for Ecosystem X: The Last Balance

_deploy_exclusions._comment: output_directory is repo root, so EdgeOne would publish EVERYTHING here by default — including security/PENTEST-REPORT.md, which must never be publicly reachable. Before going live: (1) check the EdgeOne Pages console for an ignore-file / deny-path / scoped-output-directory mechanism and use it to block /security/**, /.codebuddy/**, /.claude/**, /tools/**, and the root *.md design docs (README.md can stay); (2) if no such mechanism exists, move security/PENTEST-REPORT.md out of this repo (or into a separate private repo) before connecting it to EdgeOne Pages. Verify post-deploy: curl -I <site>/security/PENTEST-REPORT.md must return 404, not 200.

headers._comment: Must match _headers (repo root) and security/deploy-headers.md EXACTLY — that file is the PENTEST-verified source of truth (finding F1). If EdgeOne Pages doesn't auto-read the _headers file, configure these same values by hand under EdgeOne console → Rules → Response Headers. Do not weaken any of these.

headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data:; media-src 'self'; connect-src 'self'; font-src 'self'; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'none'; form-action 'none'; frame-ancestors 'none'

security._comment: EdgeOne WAF/DDoS/bot management — claims the Game Security Architecture AI module. Capture dashboard screenshots for the PPT.

cdn._comment: SE-Asia CDN matches the wetland setting and the SEA division roadshow.

_optional_ai_ecologist_proxy._comment: Tier B (chosen stretch) — see INTEGRATIONS-DECISION.md + skills/project/ai-ecologist.md. Secure proxy for the live AI advisor. Leaderboard NOT built.
_optional_ai_ecologist_proxy._model_key_note: The model API key is a FUNCTION env var only — never in the static bundle or this file.

environment_variables._comment: Public-safe config only — the core game is fully client-side. No secrets here. The advisor's model key is set on the Function, not in the static bundle.
